subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, two blessed souls from among the servants of the Abhá Beauty have journeyed to the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء دو نفس مبارک از بندگان جمال ابهی بزیارت عتبه مقدسه
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
